description: Returned by publish-post skill. Confirms LinkedIn post state transition is complete.

filename.description: Base filename of the published post (without extension)

post_url.description: Live LinkedIn post URL provided by operator

comment_moved.description: Confirms self-comment file moved to posted/comments/ (false if no comment existed)

git_pushed.description: Confirms git commit and push completed successfully

validation_note: draft_moved must be true. git_pushed must be true. post_url must be a valid linkedin.com URL.
